title: ForceBlocks
description: Create a sphere where no monster or player can enter using the power of Force Blocks!
body:
The ForceBlocks plugin allows for an effective barrier around the placed ForceBlock that can either push or pull surrounding monsters and players.

**Commands:**

In order to get a force block you must hold a block such as obsidian, crying obsidian or netherite and type the command: /applyforceblock <radius>

The radius can be anything you like although don't go too high as this may crash the server. I would recommend 10.

In order to allow other players to walk around the land protected by the ForceBlock unaffected, the player who placed it must do the command: /forceblocktrust <player>

An admin command to bypass all Force Blocks is: /bypassforceblock

Some other fun commands in this plugin include:

/projectileaimbot

/reach <reach>

/follow <player>

**Permissions:**

forceblock.apply - /applyforceblock

forceblock.projectileaimbot - /projectileaimbot

forceblock.reach - /reach

forceblock.follow - /follow

forceblock.bypass - /bypassforceblock

![A visual representation of a ForceBlock with a hologram above it displaying the mode its in and whos ForceBlock it is](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d57332534849ef8a052f48dcb0148f8cb018861.png)

**Dependencies (IMPORTANT!!)**

This plugin requires the following plugins in order to work:
DecentHolograms
PlaceholderAPI
